title.en: Xiao Yue appeared beside Ye Tian.

content.en:
"Husband, what's wrong?"

Xiao Yue appeared beside Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen, daughter Ye Xingyue, and sister Ye Yu also went out one after another, and they didn't know what was happening, so they asked one by one.

"The Xuanxu Forbidden Realm is about to be promoted to the Saint Realm!"

Ye Tian explained.

"The !!! of the Sacred Realm"

Xiao Yue also knew a lot about the Dark Sacred Realm from Ye Tian's mouth, so she also knew a little bit about the Sacred Realm, which was a world that only the Holy Land had!

And no matter how powerful the Holy Land is, it is necessary to have at least one Superior Domain Ancestor and multiple Invincible Domain Ancestors to be able to build or own a Holy Realm.

This shows how rare the Holy Realm is.

And now, the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm is about to be promoted to the Holy Realm!

At this time, they finally knew why Ye Tian spent so much money to buy the territory of many forces.

At first, they thought that Ye Tian was just letting the Terran occupy more territory, just to make the entire Xuanxu Forbidden Realm become the territory of the Terran, so that the Terran could develop.

But now, at last, they knew.

The Xuanxu Forbidden Realm was promoted to the Holy Realm, and the territory of the Xuanxu Sacred Realm was too valuable!

It can be said that the value of a square meter of land in the Holy Realm is many, many times higher than that of a universe in the outside world.

Before, those forces still had their own territory in the Holy Realm, if they didn't trade it to the Terrans, those territories would belong to them, unless Ye Tian destroyed them, they could have a large piece of the Holy Realm's territory, which was far more precious than the benefits that Ye Tian gave them.

I have to say that these forces have lost!

However, the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm was Ye Tian's single-handedly promoted evolution, and they were actually not at a loss, but they just couldn't get the benefits brought by the promotion of the Holy Realm.

As for these forces not regretting it, Ye Tian didn't care at all.

He dared to guarantee that no force would dare to make trouble, otherwise he would directly destroy that force and would not be so polite.

As time passed, the volume of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm became larger and larger.

Ten times over!

Hundredfold!

A thousandfold!

10,000 times!

100,000 times!

A million times!

......

I have to say that the difference between the Holy Realm and the Forbidden Realm is too great, and the value of a Sacred Realm is not known to be many thousand times more than that of a Forbidden Realm.

Moreover, this world has fused the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, the Holy Realm is just the beginning, and it is not impossible that it will be promoted to the Ancestral Realm in the future, and even surpass the Ancestral Realm.

After a long time, the Xuanxu Holy Realm was officially born and stabilized.

And the changes in the Daoshan Realm are not over yet, it is still expanding, and it is already hundreds of times larger than the original small realm, giving birth to a huge ownerless area.

This unowned area will gradually give birth to some new substances, and for other forces, these new material treasures are also of high value, after all, such a huge area, if they are allowed to collect, how many resources can be collected?

For them, such a large area is equivalent to hundreds of new realms, enough to make many forces crazy.

But compared to the Xuanxu Saint Realm, this gain is nothing.

The biggest change in the Dao Mountain Realm is that the area of the area has become larger, that is, the Chaos Yuan Qi has become more than ten times richer, and then the rules are much stronger.

At the moment, the qualitative change in the Daoshan realm is not obvious.

But with the passage of time, I am afraid that many precious treasures will be born in the Daoshan Realm in the future.

For example, before, the Daoshan Realm rarely gave birth to treasures suitable for domain ancestors, and the treasures born were basically low-level, not very suitable for domain ancestors.

But now, the Daoshan Realm is no longer an ordinary realm, but a super-large realm, which is enough to give birth to many extremely precious resources.

And the Xuanxu Saint Realm is even more remarkable, I am afraid that it is enough to give birth to many treasures that make both the Supreme Domain Ancestor and the Invincible Domain Ancestor very excited.

But now the Xuanxu Holy Realm already belongs to the human race, and only the resource treasure land that the human race does not look down on, they can enter and rob it, otherwise it will be a provocation to the human race.

---------------------

After the Xuanxu Saint Realm stabilized, Ye Tian began to let the powerhouses of the human race collect the resources of the newborn on a large scale.

As the master of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and also equivalent to the master of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he can perceive some situations in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, although he can't accurately know the situation of each treasure, but he can sense which area has more treasures born, so that the powerhouses of the human race will go to collect them in the first place, so as not to be taken away by the foreign domain ancestors in the future.

For the next few years, almost no one of the Terrans was in retreat, searching for resources and treasures, as well as occupying new territory.

The Xuanxu Saint Realm is a million times larger than before, and it is conceivable how much spare territory there is in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and now it belongs to the human race, and many weak humans can obtain a large amount of territory.

As a result, countless families were born and children were born frantically, just to increase the population and gain more territory.

Under such circumstances, the number of Terrans is growing at an incredible rate.

Even many human beings have entered the time array to increase the number of offspring, such as how many generations have to be born in a 10,000-fold time acceleration environment?

A small world, open 10,000 times the time to accelerate, the outside world for a year, a small world for 10,000 years, even a small family, in the case of increasing the number of offspring at all costs, I am afraid that countless billions of human beings can be born.

And many forces of the entire human race have done this, and in just ten years, the population of the entire human race has increased thousands of times, which is very exaggerated.

However, in order to gain more territory, I am afraid that this measure will continue for a long time, until the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm is completely destroyed.

Ye Tian knew that this method of many families was a bit unkind, but he didn't care about it, after all, it was also the choice of those families.

Moreover, this can indeed make the number of humans explode many times in a short period of time, so that the Terrans can quickly occupy those empty territories.

The strength of the human race will also skyrocket in a short period of time, which is a good thing!

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years have passed.

At this time, the Xuanxu Holy Realm has changed greatly!
